column8: port reads full local header+compressed payload into memory and inflates via TD5_TINFL_DECOMPRESS (zlib when -DTD5_INFLATE_USE_ZLIB); orig streams via 64KB refill buffer + chunked inflate state. ZIP fields, method 0/8 split, CRC32 stored-check preserved
port td5_asset_read_entry_from_path mirrors orig loose-file-first (fopen entry name) then ZIP fallback via central-dir + decompress_entry; same calling convention and side-effects
port td5_asset_open_and_read mirrors orig loose-file-first fopen/ftell/malloc/read, else ZIP central-dir parse + malloc(uncomp_sz) + decompress; out_size populated like orig returned uncomp size
port td5_asset_get_entry_size_from_path mirrors orig: fopen+fseek(end)+ftell loose-file probe first, else ParseZipCentralDirectory equivalent via td5_asset_open_archive + get_entry_size

cop-branch shape preserved (siren active/actor/fade_target writes + sky rotation); non-cop branch ARCH-DIVERGENCE acknowledged in port comment — orig DXSound::Status(slot*3+3) + skid-loop globals replaced by slot_is_playing + engine_state reset
